title: Announce scheduler and transmission
description:
Implement periodic announce transmission.

AnnounceScheduler class:
- __init__(node_identity, interval=300)
- async start() -> None
- async stop() -> None
- build_announce() -> AnnounceMessage
- async announce_loop()

Behavior:
- Wait ANNOUNCE_INTERVAL + random jitter
- Build announce with current seq_num
- Sign with node's private key
- Broadcast to neighbors
- Increment seq_num

Seq_num persistence:
- Persist to flash on increment
- Load on startup
- Ensure monotonic across reboots

Integration with Node class main loop.
close_reason: Implemented upstream in python/src/lichen/announce/scheduler.py (AnnounceScheduler: build_announce, periodic start/stop with jitter, seq_num increment, sign via identity). tests/announce/test_scheduler.py.
